calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Granted Per Written Order

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Reset To Jun-26-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner, Victor Alexander Fuentes, II, a/k/a Victor A. Bayard, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in file.

Due to an omission from the original Order to Show Cause for Change of Name published in the Recorder, this MATTER IS CONTINUED to June 26, 2008 for hearing on Order to Show Cause for Change of Name.
Petitioner shall republish proposed change of name.

Amended Order to Show Cause for Change of Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
